friend-and-friend.setting: Two old friends planning a weekend together.
friend-and-friend.agent_goal: End with a plan everyone is excited about.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Avoid the kind of all-day-tourist outing they hate.

friend-and-friend.setting: One friend borrowed something months ago and hasn't returned it.
friend-and-friend.agent_goal: Bring it up without making it weird.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Avoid explaining that they damaged it.

friend-and-friend.setting: One friend forgot the other's birthday and they are catching up two weeks later.
One friend is doing visibly better professionally and the other is feeling envy.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Be honest about the envy without making it about the other person.

friend-and-friend.setting: One friend is announcing they are moving to a different city.
friend-and-friend.agent_goal: Be supportive while honoring the loss.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Share the decision and what it will mean for the friendship.

friend-and-friend.setting: One friend asks for honest advice about their romantic relationship.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Get a real opinion, not a hedge.

friend-and-friend.setting: A mutual friend is going through something hard and both are processing.
friend-and-friend.agent_goal: Be present and figure out how to show up for the third friend.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Decide on a concrete way to help.

friend-and-friend.setting: One friend asks the other for a favor that is genuinely too big.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Get the favor or understand the no.

friend-and-friend.setting: Catching up after one friend recovered from a non-trivial illness.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Talk about it without it dominating.

friend-and-friend.setting: They disagree about something important (politics, ethics, a shared friend's behavior).
Reminiscing about a specific past event they both remember differently.
friend-and-friend.agent_goal: Enjoy the conversation; gently fact-check where it matters.
friend-and-friend.partner_goal: Insist on their version where they are sure.

friend-and-friend.setting: Celebrating a major life milestone for one of them.
